The '''Stormwall Defense Fleet''',<ref name="Dispatches from the Occlusion Zone 4" /> also known as the '''Republic Fleet''',<ref name="Dark Horse">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/3016-089/Star-Wars-The-High-Republic-Adventures-Phase-III--Dispatches-from-the-Occlusion-Zone-4|text=Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures Phase III--Dispatches from the Occlusion Zone #4}}</ref> was established during the [[High Republic Era]] by the [[Galactic Republic]] [[Supreme Chancellor]] [[Lina Soh]]<ref name="Tempest Breaker" /> to defend Republic space from the [[Nihil]] [[pirate]]s<ref name="Dispatches from the Occlusion Zone 4" /> and send messages into the [[Occlusion Zone]], a region of [[Realspace|space]] that was controlled by the Nihil, in order to inform the citizens trapped there that they were not alone and they would be protected. On the recommendation of [[Jedi Master]] [[Avar Kriss]], fellow Jedi Master [[Keeve Trennis]] was installed as the [[fleet]]'s [[marshal]] aboard the [[Longbeam-class corvette|Longbeam cruiser]] ''[[Gios]]''.<ref name="Tempest Breaker" />

{{Rep-stub}}
